arts.ttl: We simulated Liverpool vs Fulham to get a Premier League score prediction
arts.sum: Liverpool take on Fulham at Anfield on Saturday afternoon, so we simulated the clash to predict the outcome.

arts.ttl: Exclusive: Newcastle facing difficulties as Liverpool swoop in for €60m-rated 21-year-old with 9 G/A in 21 games
arts.sum: Newcastle will be looking to strengthen their squad this winter but are facing difficulties in trying to land PSV’s brilliant right winger, Johan Bakayoko. According to CaughtOffside sources, the Magpies have been quietly tracking the 21-year-old for some time, however, Liverpool have now entered the picture and are believed to be in a better financial […] The post Exclusive: Newcastle facing difficulties as Liverpool swoop in for €60m-rated 21-year-old with 9 G/A in 21 games appeared first on CaughtOffside.

arts.ttl: Arne Slot offers new injury update on three Liverpool players
arts.sum: Arne Slot has offered an injury update on Kostas Tsimikas, Ibrahima Konate and Conor Bradley ahead of Liverpool's festive period

arts.ttl: ‘I played for Liverpool, Chelsea and Arsenal – this was the best transfer of my career’
arts.sum: Yossi Benayoun may be best remembered for his three-year stint with Liverpool between 2007 and 2010, but the Israeli midfielder has admitted that signing for a different club was his best decision

arts.ttl: Arne Slot is about to get what he's waited all season for after careful Liverpool summer plan
arts.sum: Arne Slot is about to have his full Liverpool attacking quota available to him fully for the first time - but it remains to be seen for how long

arts.ttl: Liverpool boss Arne Slot reveals what he expects from Darwin Nunez: 'We see his qualities'
arts.sum: Liverpools big-money No.9 Darwin Nunez is coming under fire after scoring just three times so far this season, and missing a number of big chances in Tuesday's 1-0 win over Girona in the Champions League

arts.ttl: Why Alexis Mac Allister Isn't Playing for Liverpool vs. Fulham
arts.sum: Alexis Mac Allister will miss Liverpool's Premier League clash with Fulham as he serves his one-game suspension.

arts.ttl: Why isn't Liverpool vs Fulham on TV? How to watch Premier League game
arts.sum: Liverpool will aim to tighten their grasp on top spot with a result against 10th-placed Fulham on Saturday, but fans in the UK hoping to watch the action will be unable to do so

arts.ttl: Liverpool without five players for Fulham as major return confirmed
